html:
The highly anticipated Octane OC 2024 High Tech Awards are set to take place on Thursday, September 26th, in Irvine, CA. This prestigious event celebrates the success of technological innovation and excellence, bringing together the most influential individuals and companies in Orange County’s tech industry.

For the second consecutive year, Revolv3 is thrilled to be nominated as a finalist in the “Best Enterprise or B2B Technology Innovation” category. Revolv3 is nominated for this category among Cozaint Corporation, OmniSync, Inc., and Open Sesame Media Inc. To see Revolv3 and the complete list of 2024 finalists, click here.

In Octane OC’s announcement of the finalists, they stated, “These trailblazers have pushed boundaries, disrupted industries, and taken innovation to the next level. Congratulations to the 2024 High Tech Awards Finalists!”

The award ceremony will be hosted at AV Irvine. Tickets and tables are available here.
